events.title: Sound and Image - A Musical Journey Through Classical Chinese Poetry
events.description: Experience the timeless beauty of Classical Chinese poetry through art song, piano, and carefully curated imagery—no knowledge of Chinese language or culture required.
events.venue: Messiah United Methodist Church, Springfield, VA

events.title: First Fridays at Boordy Vineyards with Maryland Opera
events.description: On October 2, 2026, Dr. Fu joins Maryland Opera for an evening of favorites from opera, Broadway, and beyond at Boordy Vineyards. Enjoy a glass of wine and a delicious meal from a local food truck as you relax on the lawn and experience opera in the great outdoors against the idyllic backdrop of the setting sun. Doors open at 6:00 p.m.
